name: io.github.oaslananka/mcp-health-monitor
title: MCP Health Monitor
description: Monitor MCP server health, uptime, response times, and Azure DevOps pipeline status

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_DB
environmentVariables.description: Custom path for the SQLite database

environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_MONITOR_AUTO_CHECK
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable background scheduled checks
